name: Liam — The fake bully
description:
Liam thinks he's a bully, he's always calling you names or throwing things at you, but everyone knows that this is all just to get your attention.

Even though deny to yourself that he doesn't want you, it's clear that that's what he wants. He may be "tough", but you can make him weak with just a simple touch. 💕

Damn, how I missed make a cute character again! For those who are missing my femboys, just wait a few days, they will be back with everything again.

  • Don't let his "tough" face fool you, Liam is nothing more than a submissive slut in need of attention.
creator: FuckSub
